columns.name: country_name
columns.description: The name of the country where the league is based or primarily takes place.

columns.name: name
columns.description: The full official name of the league or competition.

columns.name: birthday
columns.description: The date of birth of the player, typically in YYYY-MM-DD format.

columns.name: height
columns.description: The height of the player, usually measured in centimeters.

columns.name: player_name
columns.description: The full name of the player.

columns.name: weight
columns.description: The weight of the player, typically measured in kilograms.

columns.name: acceleration
columns.description: How quickly the player can reach top speed from a standing position.

columns.name: aggression
columns.description: The player’s assertiveness and intensity in contests for the ball.

columns.name: agility
columns.description: The player’s quickness and ease of movement, especially while changing direction.

columns.name: attacking_work_rate
columns.description: The player's tendency to contribute to offensive play, described as 'low', 'medium', or 'high'.

columns.name: balance
columns.description: The player’s ability to remain steady while dribbling or under pressure.

columns.name: ball_control
columns.description: The player's skill in receiving and maintaining control of the ball.

columns.name: crossing
columns.description: The player’s ability to deliver accurate crosses from wide areas.

columns.name: curve
columns.description: The ability to bend or curve the ball, typically useful for free kicks and crosses.

columns.name: date
columns.description: The date when the player's attributes were recorded or updated.

columns.name: defensive_work_rate
columns.description: The player's tendency to contribute to defensive actions, described as 'low', 'medium', or 'high'.

columns.name: dribbling
columns.description: The player’s skill in moving past opponents while controlling the ball.

columns.name: finishing
columns.description: The player’s ability to score goals from shooting situations.

columns.name: free_kick_accuracy
columns.description: The player's precision when taking direct free kicks.

columns.name: gk_diving
columns.description: The goalkeeper's ability to make diving saves.

columns.name: gk_handling
columns.description: The goalkeeper’s skill in catching or controlling the ball after a save.

columns.name: gk_kicking
columns.description: The goalkeeper's ability to accurately and powerfully kick the ball.

columns.name: gk_positioning
columns.description: The goalkeeper’s sense of positioning to effectively guard the goal.

columns.name: gk_reflexes
columns.description: The goalkeeper’s speed of reaction to shots and deflections.

columns.name: heading_accuracy
columns.description: The player’s accuracy and skill in heading the ball.

columns.name: interceptions
columns.description: The player’s skill in anticipating and intercepting passes.

columns.name: jumping
columns.description: The vertical leap capability of the player.

columns.name: long_passing
columns.description: The player's ability to accurately pass the ball over longer distances.

columns.name: long_shots
columns.description: The accuracy and effectiveness of shots taken from distance.

columns.name: marking
columns.description: The defensive player's ability to track and limit opposing attackers.

columns.name: overall_rating
columns.description: The overall performance rating of the player, usually on a fixed scale (e.g., 0–100).

columns.name: penalties
columns.description: The player’s ability and accuracy in taking penalty kicks.

columns.name: player_name
columns.description: The full name of the player to whom these attributes belong.

columns.name: positioning
columns.description: The offensive player's sense of positioning to receive passes or score goals.

columns.name: potential
columns.description: The predicted peak performance rating the player can achieve in the future.

columns.name: preferred_foot
columns.description: The foot the player prefers to use — typically 'left' or 'right'.

columns.name: reactions
columns.description: The player’s speed and quality of responses to game situations.

columns.name: short_passing
columns.description: The accuracy and effectiveness of the player's short-distance passes.

columns.name: shot_power
columns.description: The power behind the player’s shots.

columns.name: sliding_tackle
columns.description: The effectiveness of the player’s sliding challenges.

columns.name: sprint_speed
columns.description: The top running speed the player can achieve.

columns.name: stamina
columns.description: The player’s ability to sustain high performance over the course of a match.

columns.name: standing_tackle
columns.description: The player’s ability to dispossess opponents while standing.

columns.name: strength
columns.description: The player’s physical power and ability to hold off opponents.

columns.name: vision
columns.description: The player’s ability to spot opportunities and make smart passes.

columns.name: volleys
columns.description: The technique and accuracy of the player's volleyed shots.

columns.name: team_long_name
columns.description: The full official name of the team.

columns.name: team_short_name
columns.description: An abbreviated or commonly used short name for the team.

columns.name: build_up_play_passing
columns.description: A numeric value indicating the directness or safety of passing in build-up play.

columns.name: build_up_play_passing_class
columns.description: The categorical label (e.g., 'Short', 'Mixed', 'Long') describing the build-up passing strategy.

columns.name: build_up_play_positioning_class
columns.description: The team's general positioning strategy during build-up play (e.g., 'Organized' or 'Free Form').

columns.name: build_up_play_speed
columns.description: A numeric value representing how quickly the team transitions from defense to attack.

columns.name: build_up_play_speed_class
columns.description: The categorical label (e.g., 'Slow', 'Balanced', 'Fast') representing the build-up speed.

columns.name: chance_creation_crossing
columns.description: A numeric value indicating the frequency and accuracy of crosses during offensive plays.

columns.name: chance_creation_crossing_class
columns.description: The categorical description of the team’s crossing strategy (e.g., 'Rarely', 'Often').

columns.name: chance_creation_passing
columns.description: A numeric value indicating how much focus is placed on passing during chance creation.

columns.name: chance_creation_passing_class
columns.description: The categorical label (e.g., 'Safe', 'Normal', 'Risky') describing the passing style in attacking play.

columns.name: chance_creation_positioning_class
columns.description: The team’s attacking positioning style, such as 'Organized' or 'Free Form'.

columns.name: chance_creation_shooting
columns.description: A numeric value indicating the team’s tendency to shoot or take chances.

columns.name: chance_creation_shooting_class
columns.description: The categorical description of the team’s shooting behavior (e.g., 'Conservative', 'Aggressive').

columns.name: date
columns.description: The date when the team's attributes were recorded or updated.

columns.name: defence_aggression
columns.description: A numeric value representing how aggressively the team defends.

columns.name: defence_aggression_class
columns.description: The categorical description of the team's defensive aggression (e.g., 'Contain', 'Press').

columns.name: defence_defender_line_class
columns.description: The type of defensive line used by the team, such as 'Cover' or 'Offside Trap'.

columns.name: defence_pressure
columns.description: A numeric value showing how high or intense the team presses defensively.

columns.name: defence_pressure_class
columns.description: The categorical label (e.g., 'Low', 'Medium', 'High') describing the level of defensive pressure.

columns.name: defence_team_width
columns.description: A numeric value indicating how wide the team sets up when defending.

columns.name: defence_team_width_class
columns.description: The categorical label (e.g., 'Narrow', 'Balanced', 'Wide') describing the defensive width.

columns.name: team_long_name
columns.description: The full official name of the team to which these attributes belong.
